title: Search Trends: Who Won World Cup as England Claim Third Place
description: Google Trends data shows high interest in the World Cup winner following reports that England secured a bronze medal victory.

sources.title: ‘Something very special’: Tuchel reflects on World Cup after England claim third
Chelsea trio feature in all-time World Cup classic | News | Official Site
Guéhi and Anderson help England to Bronze medal win

sections.heading: Search Volume
paragraphs: According to Google Trends, the search term "who won world cup" had a reported search lower bound of 200,000 in the GB region. The trend feed was published on July 19, 2026.

sections.heading: England's Tournament Result
paragraphs: Multiple sources reported on England's final standing in the competition. According to The Guardian, England claimed third place in the World Cup. Similarly, Manchester City FC reported that players Guéhi and Anderson helped England secure a Bronze medal win.

sections.heading: Reactions and Highlights
paragraphs: Thomas Tuchel reflected on the World Cup after England claimed third, describing the event as "something very special" according to The Guardian. Additionally, Chelsea Football Club noted that a trio of their players featured in an "all-time World Cup classic."

faq.q: What was the search volume for 'who won world cup'?
faq.a: Google Trends reported a search lower bound of 200,000 for this term in the GB region.

faq.q: How did England perform in the World Cup?
faq.a: According to The Guardian and Manchester City FC, England claimed third place and won the Bronze medal.

faq.q: Who commented on the World Cup outcome?
faq.a: Thomas Tuchel reflected on the tournament following England's third-place finish, according to The Guardian.
